case_title: KANBAR, MAURICE VS UNITED AIRLINES, LYNNE M. HERBST, SUPERVISOR

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO LYNNE M HERBST SUPERVISOR UNITED AIRLINES S.F. INT'L AIRPORT RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANBAR, MAURICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES,  LYNNE M.
